'''''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 16''' is the sixteenth issue of [[Star Wars Insider|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'']], later rebranded as the ''Star Wars Insider''. Issue 16 was published in Spring [[1992]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
===Features===
*"''[[Star Wars]]'' Returns to [[Star Wars comic books|Comics]]: Fan Club Exclusive" by [[Joe Terwilliger]]
*"''Young [[Indiana Jones|Indy]]'' Renewed for Second Season"
*"Sean Patrick Flanery: The Further Adventures of Young Indiana Jones" by [[Dan Madsen]]
*"Uncovering the History Behind ''Young Indy''" by Dan Madsen
